info.title: Gambizon E-commerce API
info.description:
Comprehensive REST API for Gambizon e-commerce platform.
      
      **Features:**
      - JWT Authentication
      - Product Management
      - Shopping Cart
      - Order Processing
      - Parcel Delivery
      - Image Upload (Cloudinary)
      - Password Reset (Email)
      
      **Authentication:**
      Most endpoints require JWT authentication. Click the "Authorize" button and enter: Bearer <your-token>

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: User registration, login, logout, and password reset

tags.name: Admin - Orders
tags.description: Admin order management and status updates

tags.name: Admin - Parcels
tags.description: Admin parcel management and status updates

tags.name: Upload
tags.description: Image upload for profiles and products

BearerAuth.description: Enter your JWT token in the format: Bearer <token>

productImages.description: Image files to upload to Cloudinary (max 5 files, 5MB each, jpg/jpeg/png/webp)

get.summary: Get all orders (with optional status filter)
Get all parcels (with optional status filter)

post.summary: Create a new product (with optional image uploads)

images.description: Optional array of existing image URLs

productImages.description: Optional image files to upload (max 5, 5MB each, jpg/jpeg/png/webp)

put.summary: Update a product (with optional image uploads)

images.description: Array of image URLs to replace existing images

productImages.description: New image files to upload and append (max 5, 5MB each)

imageUrl.description: Full Cloudinary URL of the image to delete

post.summary: Login user and get JWT token

put.summary: Update current user profile (with optional profile image)

200.description: Reset link sent (or email doesn't exist message)

500.description: Server error or email sending failed

post.summary: Reset password with token from email

400.description: Cart is empty or validation error

post.description: Create a payment intent for an order or parcel delivery

relatedType.description: Type of entity to pay for

relatedId.description: ID of the order or parcel

400.description: Invalid request or order already paid

403.description: Not authorized to pay for this resource
Not authorized to view this payment

400.description: No image provided or invalid format
No images provided or invalid format

imageUrl.description: Full Cloudinary URL of the image to delete

400.description: Image URL not provided or not found
